purpose: Record the report-only Approved Agent Build Runner Merge Gate semantics and the numbered autonomy stage model so gate configuration readiness is validated separately from concrete PR merge/deploy execution readiness.

semanticSplit.gateConfigurationReadyMeaning: Gate configuration readiness: the merge-gate policy, register, documentation, validator, and Quality Gate integration are internally consistent and safe to report.
semanticSplit.mergeReadyMeaning: A concrete pull request has all required local, post-PR, GitHub check, protected-scope, human-review, and mergeability evidence needed before a human may merge.
semanticSplit.expectedReportOnlyState: GATE_CONFIGURATION_READY=true with MERGE_READY=false is safe and expected while post-PR and required-check evidence is incomplete.
semanticSplit.validatorExitRule: The validator exits non-zero only when GATE_CONFIGURATION_READY=false; MERGE_READY=false is reported as a merge blocker, not as validator failure.

mergeReadinessBlockers: Missing post-PR mergeability evidence blocks actual merge readiness.
Missing required GitHub checks or unknown required-check status blocks actual merge readiness.
Missing local required-check evidence blocks actual merge readiness.
Protected or runtime product scope requires human review and blocks automated merge readiness.
Human PR review remains required before any merge.
Stage 1.3 merge/deploy eligibility output is report-only and cannot execute merge, deploy, approval, PR close, repository-setting change, or environment mutation.

missingCheckHandling.qualityGateExpectation: Quality Gate accepts MERGE_READY=false for this report-only gate when GATE_CONFIGURATION_READY=true and the non-authorizing safety signals are present.

allowedOnlyFor: missing mapped references in TODO or Work Map files
report-only Quality Gate integration for governance validators
forbiddenFor: PR approval, merge, unrestricted auto-merge, unrestricted auto-repair, or deployment

nextRequiredEvidenceBeforeMergeReadyCanB: Concrete PR branch is current with base and not main.
All required local checks pass and are recorded.
Post-PR mergeability guard evidence is available.
PR diff review confirms no runtime/protected/prohibited path scope.
Human review confirms merge approval outside of the agent.
Separate owner approval exists for any future Stage 2.0 manual merge assistant before it is implemented or activated.
Separate owner approval, hosted CI evidence, rollback plan, environment separation, and protected-scope exclusion exist before any future Stage 3.0 deploy assistant is implemented or activated.

stages.permission: Analyse, dry-runs, reports, eligibility decisions, and governance validation only.
mustNot: create pull requests from a runner
stages.currentStatus: Baseline safe mode; active for auto-merge itself.

stages.permission: Exactly one already-human-approved docs/register/check-script task may use a task branch, commit, and PR handoff within allowlisted governance paths.
requiredEvidence: json validation for changed policy/register files
stages.currentStatus: Allowed only for the narrow approved docs/register/check-script runner scope.

stages.permission: Only safe docs/register JSON parse/format repair may be attempted inside approved docs/register scope, with same-branch commit and rerun evidence.
mayChange: docs/register JSON-format evidence files already within approved task scope
mustNot: rewrite scripts outside the approved validator scope
requiredEvidence: rerun failed check and full required checks
stages.currentStatus: Allowed only as narrow evidence repair where the safe-repair policy explicitly permits it.

stages.permission: Produce merge/deploy eligibility reports that show present and missing evidence.
requiredEvidence: GitHub required-check status summary when available
mergeability and review evidence summary when available
deploy evidence gap summary when deploy is discussed
stages.currentStatus: Report-only visibility target; no actual merge or deploy.

stages.permission: Optional future assistant may prepare human-facing merge checklist, command suggestion, or handoff after explicit owner approval.
mustNot: merge with missing checks or reviews
merge protected/runtime scope without named review evidence
stages.currentStatus: Not active; future optional stage only.

stages.permission: Optional future assistant may prepare deploy checklist or handoff only after explicit owner approval, hosted CI evidence, rollback plan, environment separation, and protected-scope exclusion.
mustNot: change Firebase/package/workflow/deploy config unless separately approved
stages.currentStatus: Not active; future optional stage only.

autonomyStageModel.discrepancyStatement: The target direction can discuss future manual merge and deploy assistance, but the present safety state permits only docs/register/check-script handoff, narrow JSON-format repair with rerun evidence, and merge/deploy eligibility reports without execution.
